allow: Bash(PYTHONPATH=coggle/backend mypy coggle/backend/app/ 2>&1 | grep -v "Skipping analyzing" | grep -v "^$")
Bash(PYTHONPATH=coggle/backend mypy coggle/backend/app/ 2>&1 | grep -c "error:" ; PYTHONPATH=coggle/backend mypy coggle/backend/app/ 2>&1 | grep "Found")
Bash(PYTHONPATH=coggle/backend python -m mypy coggle/backend/app/ 2>&1 | grep "error:" | grep -v "Skipping analyzing")

Bash(PYTHONPATH=coggle/backend python -c "
from fastapi.testclient import TestClient
from app.main import app
client = TestClient\(app\)
resp = client.get\('/api/health'\)
print\(f'Status: {resp.status_code}'\)
print\(f'Body: {resp.text[:200]}'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(PYTHONPATH=coggle/backend python -c "
from app.main import app
for r in app.routes:
    print\(r.path, r.methods\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(PYTHONPATH=coggle/backend python -c "
from app.core.logger import logger
print\('logger imported'\)
from app.main import app
print\('app imported'\)
for r in app.routes:
    print\(r.path\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(PYTHONPATH=coggle/backend python -c "
from app.api.health import router as health_router
print\('health router imported, routes:', [r.path for r in health_router.routes]\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(PYTHONPATH=coggle/backend python -c "
from app.main import app
from app.api.health import router as health_router
app.include_router\(health_router\)
for r in app.routes:
    print\(r.path\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(PYTHONPATH=coggle/backend python -c "
from fastapi.testclient import TestClient
from app.main import app
client = TestClient\(app\)
resp = client.get\('/api/health'\)
print\(f'Health: {resp.status_code} {resp.json\(\)}'\)
resp = client.get\('/api/blog'\)
print\(f'Blog: {resp.status_code}'\)
resp = client.get\('/api/search?q=test'\)
print\(f'Search: {resp.status_code}'\)
" 2>&1)
